posts.title: Tenderly Is Now the Simulation Company for Onchain Operations
posts.summary: The platform expanded its capabilities to enable teams to model every onchain move before capital is exposed.

posts.title: Explore Aave, Uniswap & Morpho in Context With DeFi Modules
posts.summary: New DeFi module features for examining major protocols including Aave, Uniswap, and Morpho in context.

posts.title: Impersonate Any Account Across the Dashboard With Simulation Mode
posts.summary: Simulation capability allowing account impersonation functionality across the Tenderly dashboard.

posts.title: Preview Multi-Step Flows With Simulation Bundles
posts.summary: Feature for testing complex multi-step transaction sequences before executing them on-chain.

posts.title: Test Against Live Mainnet State With Network Mirror Mode and Historical Replay
posts.summary: Test smart contracts against live mainnet state using network mirror mode and historical transaction replay.
